The '''MEC trooper''' was a heavily armed and armored specialized class of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] variants deployed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="RS" />

==History==
The MEC class included [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]], [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]] and [[Clone paratrooper/Legends|clone paratroopers]]. All of the variants included in the MEC class were some of the most well-trained fighting units in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="RS" />

==Behind the scenes==
MEC troopers have appeared in both ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'', where the customization feature allows the player to create a clone trooper with an exaggeratedly large body named a MEC trooper. With this body, the player is given three options for the head, [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commander]] [[Bacara/Legends|Bacara's]] helmet, a clone paratrooper's helmet, or a clone commando's helmet. No other information is given for this type of clone trooper, including what the acronym "MEC" stands for.<ref name="RS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]''
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' {{1st}}
